case_title: LOUIS A. GAGE VS. HARRIET CHANEY et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAGE, LOUIS A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GAGE, LOUIS A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHANEY, HARRIET THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 372 BAKER ST. #208, S.F. CA. 94117, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $19.07 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAGE, LOUIS A.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAGE, LOUIS A. AS TO DEFENDANT CHANEY, HARRIET DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAGE, LOUIS A.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAGE, LOUIS A. SERVED DEC-29-2005, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHANEY, HARRIET
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CHANEY, HARRIET
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CHANEY, HARRIET
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CHANEY, HARRIET
